ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the team (e.g., Division I, Division II, etc.) */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "preseason" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the season is a preseason */,
  "postseason" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the season includes postseason games */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_seasons" (
  "team_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-season association */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses */,
  "win_loss_percentage" REAL /* Win-loss percentage */,
  "srs" REAL /* Simple Rating System (SRS) */,
  "sos" REAL /* Strength of Schedule (SOS) */,
  "conference_wins" INTEGER /* Conference wins */,
  "conference_losses" INTEGER /* Conference losses */,
  "home_wins" INTEGER /* Home wins */,
  "home_losses" INTEGER /* Home losses */,
  "away_wins" INTEGER /* Away wins */,
  "away_losses" INTEGER /* Away losses */,
  "neutral_wins" INTEGER /* Neutral wins */,
  "neutral_losses" INTEGER /* Neutral losses */,
  "home_points_scored" INTEGER /* Home points scored */,
  "home_points_allowed" INTEGER /* Home points allowed */,
  "away_points_scored" INTEGER /* Away points scored */,
  "away_points_allowed" INTEGER /* Away points allowed */,
  "neutral_points_scored" INTEGER /* Neutral points scored */,
  "neutral_points_allowed" INTEGER /* Neutral points allowed */,
  "home_srs" REAL /* Home SRS */,
  "away_srs" REAL /* Away SRS */,
  "neutral_srs" REAL /* Neutral SRS */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponent_advanced_metrics" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent */,
  "team_season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team-season association */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "opponent_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the opponent team */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace of the game */,
  "offensive_rating" REAL /* Offensive rating */,
  "free_throw_rate" REAL /* Free throw rate */,
  "three_point_attempt_rate" REAL /* Three-point attempt rate */,
  "true_shooting_percentage" REAL /* True shooting percentage */,
  "total_rebound_percentage" REAL /* Total rebound percentage */,
  "assist_percentage" REAL /* Assist percentage */,
  "steal_percentage" REAL /* Steal percentage */,
  "block_percentage" REAL /* Block percentage */,
  "effective_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Effective field goal percentage */,
  "turnover_percentage" REAL /* Turnover percentage */,
  "offensive_rebound_percentage" REAL /* Offensive rebound percentage */,
  "free_throws_per_field_goal_attempt" REAL /* Free throws per field goal attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opponent_advanced_metrics_team_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_season_id") REFERENCES team_seasons ("team_season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team-season association */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (Home, Away, Neutral) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (Win, Loss) */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "points_allowed" INTEGER /* Points allowed to the opponent */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, postseason, tournament) */,
  "broadcast_network" TEXT /* Broadcast network of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_season_id") REFERENCES team_seasons ("team_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "year_of_birth" TEXT /* Year of birth of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "hand" TEXT /* Hand of the player (left or right) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_seasons" (
  "player_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-season association */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Field goals made */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted */,
  "free-throws_made" INTEGER /* Free-throws made */,
  "free-throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Free-throws attempted */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Rebounds per game */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Assists per game */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Steals per game */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Blocks per game */,
  "turnovers_per_game" REAL /* Turnovers per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_seasons_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_seasons_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the conference is located */,
  "founded_year" TEXT /* Year the conference was founded */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the conference */,
  "conference_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "team_season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team-season association */,
  "player_season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player-season association */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_season_id") REFERENCES player_seasons ("player_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_team_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_season_id") REFERENCES team_seasons ("team_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "team_season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team-season association */,
  "conference_rank" INTEGER /* Rank within the conference */,
  "national_rank" INTEGER /* National rank */,
  "ranking_date" TEXT /* Date of the ranking */,
  "ranking_source" TEXT /* Source of the ranking (e.g., AP Poll, Coaches Poll) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rankings_team_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_season_id") REFERENCES team_seasons ("team_season_id")
)
